subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Thou hast attained unto My remembrance and My tokens, both before and after. Render thanks unto thy Lord for this most great bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی قد فزت بذکری و آثاری من قبل و من بعد اشکری ربک بهذا الفضل الاعظم و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @thankfulness; gratitude, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
